rooms.name: Ashen Hallow
rooms.description: A desolate place where ash and snow entwine like skeletal fingers. Exits: 'north', 'east'.

rooms.name: Thornhollow Ruin
rooms.description: Vines have reclaimed the entrance, hiding ancient secrets within darkness. Exits: 'west', 'north'.

rooms.name: Moonlit Fenway
rooms.description: Silver water weaves through a tapestry of moon-dappled reeds at nightfall. Exits: 'south', 'east'.

rooms.name: Elder's Keep
rooms.description: Forgotten texts bind books to crumbling shelves where shadows reign. Exits: 'west', 'south', 'north'.

rooms.name: Duskwater Falls
rooms.description: Frozen cascades plunge into an abyss where only mist and silence remain. Exits: 'south'.

items.name: Glinting Sceptre
items.description: A rod that shatters light, imbuing its wielder with echoes of forgotten battles.

items.name: Frosted Chalice
items.description: Ice-encrusted vessel contains a draught capable of soothing even the coldest of hearts.

items.name: Whispering Oar
items.description: Paddles whisper secrets to those brave enough to listen in the stillness of dawn.

items.name: Shattered Hourglass
items.description: Time itself appears broken, lost grains whispering ancient truths.

npcs.name: Arcturus Blackwood
npcs.description: An enigmatic bard whose lute weeps with sorrow for a forgotten love.
npcs.dialogue: In Ashen Hallow lies the one who brings darkness to our stage.

npcs.name: Korvus Ironfist
npcs.description: A blacksmith forged in fire and shadow; his wares temper courage, not metal.
npcs.dialogue: Hear me, traveler: you seek a blade tempered by the very darkness itself.

npcs.name: Xandri Moonwhisper
npcs.description: An ethereal mystic bound to the lunar cycle, guiding lost souls through night's terrors.
npcs.dialogue: Follow the moon's path, where secrets slumber and darkness reigns supreme.

npcs.name: Korvath, Devourer of Souls
npcs.description: A creature born from nightmares, feeding on terror that courses like a dark river.
npcs.dialogue: Your screams will be my feast tonight.

npcs.name: The Lost Aria
npcs.description: Retrieve the Glinting Sceptre hidden in Elder's Keep to break the curse that haunts Ashen Hallow.

quests.name: The Shadowed Depths
quests.description: Steal the Shattered Hourglass from Duskwater Falls, where time itself is said to have been lost.

quests.name: The Wizard's Lost Wand
quests.description: The Old Wizard's enchanted wand ended up in the Dark Forest. Retrieve it and return it to the Wizard.

player.name: Eira
player.description: A brave young warrior with a sharp mind and sharper blade.
